supervisor-engine.name: supervisor-engine
supervisor-engine.description: Motor supervisor - roda o fluxo completo de revisao (code-review + security + performance + tests + docs + deps)

code-archeologist.name: code-archeologist
code-archeologist.description: Arqueologo de codigo - descobre codigo morto, TODOs antigos, funcoes nao usadas, dependencias orfas

library-recommender.name: library-recommender
library-recommender.description: Recomendador automatico de bibliotecas - detecta quando uma lib seria util e sugere

deep-analyzer.name: deep-analyzer
deep-analyzer.description: Analisador profundo - roda analise 5 camadas em qualquer codigo/arquivo

metrics-collector.name: metrics-collector
metrics-collector.description: Coletor de metricas - tokens, custo, latencia, qualidade

auto-fix-safe.name: auto-fix-safe
auto-fix-safe.description: Auto-fix SEGURO - aplica fixes automaticos apenas para problemas de baixa severidade

knowledge-graph.name: knowledge-graph
knowledge-graph.description: Grafo de conhecimento - mapeia relacoes entre modulos, funcoes, deps

code-archaeology.name: code-archaeology
code-archaeology.description: Arqueologia de codigo - git history + blame para encontrar origem de decisoes

smell-detector.name: smell-detector
smell-detector.description: Detector de code smells - long methods, god classes, feature envy, etc
